---
title: "About me"
---

# Introduction

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
### About Me

Hi, I am ***Firdauz*** and I am an aspiring Data Science student. <br> <br> I am keen and curious for learning. I am a passionate individual with a keen interest in technology and writing. I enjoy exploring new ideas and sharing knowledge with others. <br> <br>

Proceed on...
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![*Me/Firdauz*](img/me.jpg)
:::
:::
